query:
SELECT 
            ai.id,
            ai.email,
            r.name as role,
            ai.created_at,
            ai.expires_at,
            u.email as "invited_by_email"
        FROM admin_invitations ai
        JOIN roles r ON r.id = ai.role_id
        LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = ai.invited_by
        WHERE ai.expires_at > NOW()
          AND ai.accepted_at IS NULL
        ORDER BY ai.created_at DESC
